trigger.script:

local vehKar2 = GetEntityByName("Podsos1") if vehKar2 then vehKar2:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.000, -1.000, 0.003, 0.015)) end
local vehKar3 = GetEntityByName("Podsos2") if vehKar3 then vehKar3:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.000, -0.997, 0.002, 0.078)) end
CreateNewDummyObject( "dweller2", "AntiBuntovshik", -1, -1, CVector(7770.319, 210.548, 6486.856), Quaternion(0.0000, -0.7947, 0.0000, 0.6070), 1) CreateNewDummyObject( "dweller", "LeaderHumBunt1", -1, -1, CVector(7846.635, 203.979, 6785.052), Quaternion(0.0000, -0.9144, 0.0000, -0.4047), 1) CreateNewDummyObject( "dweller3", "PortRab1", -1, -1, CVector(7848.302, 203.978, 6783.543), Quaternion(0.0000, -0.4981, 0.0000, 0.8671), 1) CreateNewDummyObject( "brick_debris1", "CamTochka1", -1, -1, CVector(7734.515, 211.603, 6556.512), Quaternion(0, 0, 0, 0), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "brick_debris1", "CamTochka2", -1, -1, CVector(7720.085, 209.595, 6481.027), Quaternion(0, 0, 0, 0), 0)
local vehLinkID1 = GetPlayerVehicleId() local CTochID1 = GetEntityByName("CamTochka1"):GetId()
local vehLinkID2 = GetEntityByName("LeaderVehBunt1"):GetId() local CTochID2 = GetEntityByName("CamTochka2"):GetId()
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1) Fly("LeaderEscape_cam01", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 11, 1, 0 ) FlyLinked( "LeaderEscape_cam02", CTochID1, 6, 0, 0, vehLinkID1 ) Fly("LeaderEscape_cam03", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 14, 0, 0 ) FlyLinked( "LeaderEscape_cam04", CTochID2, 8, 0, 1, vehLinkID2 ) StartCinematic()

god(1)

local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetExternalPathByName("BratPL_path") vehPlayer:PlaceToEndOfPath("BratPL_path") vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) end

local vehBunt2 = GetEntityByName("PodsosTeam_vehicle_0") if vehBunt2 then vehBunt2:SetExternalPathByName("BratBunt1_path") vehBunt2:PlaceToEndOfPath("BratBunt1_path") vehBunt2:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehBunt2:SetThrottle(0) end
local vehBunt3 = GetEntityByName("PodsosTeam_vehicle_1") if vehBunt3 then vehBunt3:SetExternalPathByName("BratBunt2_path") vehBunt3:PlaceToEndOfPath("BratBunt2_path") vehBunt3:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehBunt3:SetThrottle(0) end
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
SetTolerance( 1100, 1024, RS_ENEMY )
CompleteQuest("Koch_Kavkaz_4_quest2")
TDeactivate("Brat_cin_vehicle") TDeactivate("Brat_cin_dop_1") TDeactivate("Brat_cin_dop_2") TActivate("Brat_END_cin")
trigger:Deactivate()
